segments.text: This new shoe is meant to alter your mind to focus and stimulate your brain before and after being active and I'm
trying them out. So, the idea is inside your foot there are thousands of special sensory cells, mechano receptors that detect pressure and touch and movement.
But when you're running or playing a sport, you wear shoes that give you grip and cushion and stability. Except the cost is it blocks the sensation in your feet. It mutes the feeling of those
mechano receptors. These nodes are there to do the opposite. They're designed to translate more information from the ground to your foot, bringing more sensation back to those mechano
receptors while still protecting your feet. The big goal here is to connect you more to your body through sensation to pull your focus into the present

moment before you train or compete. They were designed and tested by scientists in the mind science department in Nike's sport research lab over the last 8 years studying athletes brains before, during,
and after physical activity. So, if you want to grab a pair for yourself, quick,
go to this link. And if you want to know more about how they built these,
